official_sources.checked_fact: TUBITAK describes a consortium model involving a customer organization, technology provider company, experienced university research laboratory or center or public research center or institute, and TUBITAK Artificial Intelligence Institute.

official_sources.route_meaning: National health AI collaboration surfaces exist, but no verified institutional role exists for this project.
